series_metadata.series_title: Transmittal of Wage and Tax Statements
series_metadata.series_description: This form is filed by employers with the State accompanied by a copy of every W-2 or IT-2 wage and tax statement they have issued to employees.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Keep for 6 months after scanned then destroy. ; Electronic: An electronic record is maintained for 10 years via the ODT Info System., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
